disagreements.codex_product_stale_state: State file freshness is handled by the LLM re-reading phase docs on resume. The hook provides context, not authoritative truth. Stale state is an edge case mitigated by the existing 'check detection markers' flow.
disagreements.codex_product_merged_gate: Spec explicitly requires merged gate (Sprint 2 spec line 862-903). The brief is lightweight (<1 page) — cost of re-presenting is low.
